creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: gahr
Date: Thu Sep  6 13:11:36 2012
New Revision: 303752
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/303752

Log:
  - Fix OPTION name inconsistency introduced in r229081
  
  PR:		171339
  Submitted by:	freebsd@nagilum.org

Modified:
  head/x11-toolkits/tk84/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-toolkits/tk84/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-toolkits/tk84/Makefile	Thu Sep  6 12:43:18 2012	(r303751)
+++ head/x11-toolkits/tk84/Makefile	Thu Sep  6 13:11:36 2012	(r303752)
@@ -426,13 +426,13 @@ post-install:
 .if !defined(NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES)
 	${MKDIR} ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/../doc/wish.1 ${MANPREFIX}/man/man1/wish${TCL_VER}${THREADS_SUFFIX}.1
-.if !defined(BUILDING_TK_THREADS) && defined(WITH_TK84_MAN)
+.if !defined(BUILDING_TK_THREADS) && defined(WITH_TK84_DOC)
 .for mp in ${MAN3} ${MANN}
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|^.so man.macros|.so ${DATADIR}/man.macros|'	\
 		${WRKSRC}/../doc/${mp}
 .endfor
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${MAKE} install-doc ${MAKE_ENV}
-.endif # !defined(BUILDING_TK_THREADS) && defined(WITH_TK84_MAN)
+.endif # !defined(BUILDING_TK_THREADS) && defined(WITH_TK84_DOC)
 
 .endif # !defined(NO_INSTALL_MANPAGES)
